issues.body:

What about a few `..` and `.` cases as well? (`.join("../../../../../abc") -> "https://example.org/abc")

Also sinc

issues.body:
Taking verbatim the cases from the rfc and replacing `a` with `example.com`, the following tests pass with this PR:

```python
import pytest
from httpx.exceptions import InvalidURL

def test_url_join_rfc3986():
    url = URL("http://example.com/b/c/d;p?q")

    with pytest.raises(InvalidURL
